hero_sub: Because you've already tried the apps, the courses, and the self-study. And you're still here. That tells us everything.
problem_subtitle: The cycle most people are stuck in
problem_card1_text: You've studied grammar since school. You understand everything. But the moment you need to actually speak — in an interview, a meeting, a call — you freeze.
problem_card2_title: Apps that don't translate to real life
problem_card2_text: You've got a 300-day streak on Duolingo. But can you lead a meeting in English? Can you nail a job interview? That's what we thought.
problem_card3_title: Courses built for everyone, fit no one
problem_card3_text: Generic programmes ignore your goals, your industry, and your timeline. You don't need another level — you need a breakthrough.
solution_subtitle: The principles behind every Speexify session
value1_desc: We don't teach you what to think. We give you the voice to express what you already know — with clarity, confidence, and impact.
value1_detail: Every session is designed around your real-world goals. Preparing for an interview? Leading your first meeting in English? Your curriculum is built from your reality, not a textbook.
value2_desc: No textbooks. No scripts. Just real, messy, human conversations with coaches who know exactly how to push you forward.
value2_detail: Our coaches adapt to you in real-time. They push where you need pushing, slow down where you need support, and create the kind of authentic practice that actually builds lasting confidence.
value3_title: We understand where you're coming from
value3_desc: The hesitation. The translating in your head. The freeze before a meeting. We've seen it thousands of times — and we've built a system that breaks through it.
value3_detail: Our coaches don't just teach English — they've lived the journey. Combined with world-class methodology, we meet you where you are and take you further than you thought possible.
value4_title: Progress you can feel in weeks
value4_desc: Not vague promises. The interview you nail. The meeting you lead. The call you stop dreading. That's what we measure.
value4_detail: We track real progress with practical milestones. After a few sessions, you'll find yourself speaking up in meetings, handling tough conversations, and finally sounding like yourself in English.
how_subtitle: Not just coaching — a system built for breakthroughs
how_point1_text: We pair you with a coach who gets your industry, your goals, and exactly how to push you forward.
how_point2_text: Every session responds to you in real-time. No scripts, no rigid plans — just focused human practice that builds real confidence.
how_point3_text: Real milestones, not arbitrary certificates. You'll know exactly what improved and what's next.
how_point4_text: Book when you're ready. Reschedule when life happens. No penalties, no guilt. We adapt to you.
contrast_subtitle: You've tried the alternatives. Here's why this is different.
proof_title: Don't take our word for it
proof_subtitle: Hear from people who were exactly where you are
proof1_quote: I used to mute myself on calls. Now I'm the one leading them. Speexify didn't teach me English — they unleashed it.
proof2_quote: Two months with Speexify changed more than 10 years of studying ever did. I finally sound like myself in English.
proof3_quote: The interview coaching landed me my dream job on the first try. Every session was built around my actual goal.
cta_title: The gap between you and fluency? One conversation.
cta_sub: Your ambition brought you here. Your voice will take you everywhere else.
